name: backend
description: Phase 1 NestJS backend scaffold for POS migration

scripts.test:infra: ts-node test/infra/permission.service.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/error.mapper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/sales.phase4e.dto.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/purchases.phase4f.dto.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports.phase4g.dto.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-query.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-query-pipeline.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-summary.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/auth.dto.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/critical-route-guards.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/settings-admin.controller.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/health.controller.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/security-headers.middleware.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/cash-drawer.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/partners-listing.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/returns-listing.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/sales-write.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/purchases-write.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/returns-write.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-partner-ledger.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-balances.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-ledger.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-dashboard.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-ops.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/reports-inventory.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/inventory-count-listing.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/inventory-count-write.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/users.helper.spec.ts && ts-node test/infra/password-policy.spec.ts && npm run test:critical
scripts.test:critical: ts-node test/critical/financial-integrity.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/return-payload.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/session-auth.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/session-auth.guard.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/tenant-context.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/tenant-boundary.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/audit-tenant-propagation.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/bootstrap-admin-safety.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/held-sales-safety.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/login-rate-limit.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-financial-summary.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/operational-flows.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-dashboard-trends.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-customer-balances.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-supplier-balances.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-treasury-pagination.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-audit-logs-pagination.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/reports-business-timezone.spec.ts
scripts.test:auth: ts-node test/critical/session-auth.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/session-auth.guard.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/bootstrap-admin-safety.spec.ts && ts-node test/critical/login-rate-limit.spec.ts
scripts.check:release-gate: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:infra && npm run check:readiness && npm run check:permissions && npm run check:env-safety
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:auth && npm run test:e2e:catalog && npm run test:e2e:flows
